description:
Create a 'Post-Mortem Dashboard' tiddler tagged 'Dashboard' that dynamically lists all tiddlers tagged 'PostMortem'. The dashboard must include a button labeled 'Create New Post-Mortem' that generates a new draft tiddler with the following specifications:
- Title: New Post-Mortem Report
- Tags: PostMortem and Draft
- Field 'incident_date': YYYY-MM-DD
- Field 'severity': SEV-
- Body content:
  !! Summary
  (enter summary here)
  !! Root Cause
  (enter root cause here)
  !! Resolution
  (enter resolution here)
